Package io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxToast

Class FxToast

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.HBox
io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxToast.FxToast
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxToast extends javafx.scene.layout.HBox
A transient bottom-right notification rendered on the OverlayHost overlay layer.

FxToast auto-fades in, pauses for its configured lifetime, then fades out and removes itself from the overlay layer. Static show(javafx.scene.Scene, java.lang.String) helpers post a toast in one call without keeping a reference.

Static usage:

     
      FxToast.show(scene, "Saved!", SemanticVariant.SUCCESS);

Builder usage — for advanced control over duration/positioning:

     
      FxToast t = FxToast.builder()
          .message("Uploading…")
          .variant(SemanticVariant.INFO)
          .durationMs(4000)
          .build();
      t.postTo(scene);
See Also:
  • OverlayHost
  • SemanticVariant
  • FxToast.Builder
